title: SkyrimNet Action
description: A YAML definition mapping an NPC-performable behavior to a Papyrus script function. Shape matches SkyrimNet's WORKFLOW_ACTIONS.md. This schema is syntactic only — semantic validation (real questEditorId, real script, real function signature, valid decorator names) runs inside the dashboard via SkyrimNet's own validate_custom_action at publish time.

name.description: PascalCase or snake_case identifier for this action.

description.description: Instructions to the action LLM: when to pick this action and when NOT to. Inja template variables like {{ player.name }} are allowed.

questEditorId.description: Editor ID of the quest hosting the Papyrus script (e.g. 'SkyrimNetQuest').

scriptName.description: Name of the Papyrus script bound to the quest (e.g. 'SkyrimNetInternal').

executionFunctionName.description: Exact function name to call on the script (e.g. 'OpenTrade_Execute').

parameterMapping.description: Ordered list matching the Papyrus function's parameters. Empty array is valid for zero-parameter functions.

type.description: speaker = current NPC, dynamic = LLM-chosen value, static = hard-coded value

name.description: Required for dynamic parameters. Identifier the LLM sees.

description.description: Required for dynamic parameters. Tells the LLM what to put here.

value.description: Required for static parameters. Scalar value passed to the Papyrus function.

eligibilityRules.description: Rules combined with AND. Each rule's conditions combine with its logicalOperator. A rule with required=false is ignored entirely (SkyrimNet quirk).

decoratorName.description: Name of a registered SkyrimNet decorator function (e.g. 'is_in_faction', 'get_actor_value').

arguments.description: Arguments to the decorator. Use the token 'currentActor' or 'player' for actor references, not '{{ actor.UUID }}'.

expectedValue.description: Scalar value the decorator's return is compared against.

logicalOperator.description: Combines the conditions inside this rule.

required.description: Must be true for the rule to take effect. false means SkyrimNet ignores the rule entirely (documented quirk, not a typo).

tags.description: Optional tags used by SkyrimNet for internal action grouping. Not to be confused with manifest.json tags.

eventString.description: Optional Inja template describing what happens, used for logs and NPC memory. Supports {{ actor.name }}, {{ player.name }}, {{ action_name }}, {{ param_name }}.

isShortLived.description: If true, the action does not persist in NPC memory after execution.

enabled.description: If false, SkyrimNet skips this action entirely. Default true.

defaultPriority.description: Higher values mean the action LLM is more likely to pick this action when multiple are eligible.
